name: English Shepherd's Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg (10-oz) frozen peas or 1 lb -peas shelled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in salted water to cover until tender. Drain, cool and peel.
2. Mash the potatoes with butter, milk and season to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside.
3. Saute beef until browned, stirring to keep meat crumbly. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Add tomatoes, mushrooms, parsley, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce and gravy. Stir to mix.
5. Add peas and cook about 5 minutes.
6. Turn the mixture into a casserole dish and spread potatoes evenly over the meat.
7. Bake at 400°F for 40 minutes until the top is crispy brown.
